search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20067` | head 1 | addinfo | eval selection_duration=strftime(info_min_time, "%m/%d/%Y %I:%M:%S %p") . " - " . strftime(info_max_time, "%m/%d/%Y %I:%M:%S %p") | table selection_duration

`netflow_search_rule_20067` | `sampling(bytes_in)` | eventstats latest(src_host) as l_src_host by exp_ip src_ip | `format_ip_column(src_ip, src_ip, l_src_host)` | `per_second_chart(sum(bytes_in) by src_ip,"span=720s",720)`

`netflow_search_rule_20067` | `sampling(bytes_in)` | `sampling(packets_in)` | `sampling(flow_count)` | fillnull value="" src_host | eventstats latest(src_host) as l_src_host by exp_ip src_ip | bin span=720s _time | stats sum(bytes_in) as sumbytes sum(packets_in) as sumpacketsin sum(flow_count) as sumflowcount by nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip l_src_host _time | eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/(720) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sum(sumpacketsin) as PacketsAmount sum(sumflowcount) as Connections max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip l_src_host | sort 0 - TrafficAmount | head 20 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/84600 | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/84600 | eval TrafficSpeed=AverageSpeed/1000000 | eval TrafficAmount=TrafficAmount/1024/1024 | eval MaxTraffic=MaxTraffic/1000000 | `commas_formatting(Avg Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB, TrafficAmount, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps, MaxTraffic, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Avg Packets/s, PacketsSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Packets, PacketsAmount)` | `commas_formatting(Total Conns, Connections)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | table nfo_hostname exp_ip_name src_ip l_src_host "Max Mbps" "Avg Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" "Avg Packets/s" "Total Packets" "Total Conns" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename src_ip as "Source IP" | rename l_src_host as "Source Host"
